SELECT TOP(@p) [o].[ProductId], [p0].[Name] AS [ProductName], [p0].[MainImage] AS [ProductImage], [p0].[Brand], [c].[Name] AS [CategoryName], [p0].[StockQuantity], COALESCE(SUM([o].[Quantity]), 0) AS [TotalQuantitySold], COALESCE(SUM([o].[Subtotal]), 0.0) AS [TotalRevenue]
FROM [OrderItems] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[Status]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o0]
    WHERE [o0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [o1] ON [o].[OrderId] = [o1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[MainImage], [p].[Name], [p].[StockQuantity]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [p0] ON [o].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
INNER JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryID]
WHERE [o].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [o1].[Status] <> 4
GROUP BY [o].[ProductId], [p0].[Name], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[Brand], [c].[Name], [p0].[StockQuantity]

FROM [OrderItems] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[Status]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o0]
    WHERE [o0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [o1] ON [o].[OrderId] = [o1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (

    FROM [Products] AS [p]

    SELECT [o].[Id], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[CreatedById], [o].[CustomerEmail], [o].[CustomerFirstName], [o].[CustomerLastName], [o].[CustomerPhone], [o].[DiscountAmount], [o].[IsDeleted], [o].[ModifiedById], [o].[Notes], [o].[OrderDate], [o].[OrderNumber], [o].[PaymentMethod], [o].[PromoCodeId], [o].[ShippingCity], [o].[ShippingCost], [o].[ShippingCountry], [o].[ShippingPostalCode], [o].[ShippingStreet], [o].[Status], [o].[Subtotal], [o].[Tax], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt], [o].[UserId]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [o1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[OrderItemID], [o0].[CreatedAt], [o0].[CreatedById], [o0].[IsDeleted], [o0].[ModifiedById], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[ProductId], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[Subtotal], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [OrderItems] AS [o0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [o0].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [o0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [o1].[Id] = [s].[OrderId]

2026-04-19 16:49:48.786 +02:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (1ms) [Parameters=[@p='5'], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT TOP(@p) [o].[ProductId], [p0].[Name] AS [ProductName], [p0].[MainImage] AS [ProductImage], [p0].[Brand], [c].[Name] AS [CategoryName], [p0].[StockQuantity], COALESCE(SUM([o].[Quantity]), 0) AS [TotalQuantitySold], COALESCE(SUM([o].[Subtotal]), 0.0) AS [TotalRevenue]
FROM [OrderItems] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[Status]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o0]
    WHERE [o0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [o1] ON [o].[OrderId] = [o1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[MainImage], [p].[Name], [p].[StockQuantity]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [p0] ON [o].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
INNER JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryID]
WHERE [o].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [o1].[Status] <> 4
GROUP BY [o].[ProductId], [p0].[Name], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[Brand], [c].[Name], [p0].[StockQuantity]

FROM [Users] AS [u]
INNER JOIN [UserRoles] AS [u0] ON [u].[Id] = [u0].[UserId]
INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
WHERE [u].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [u].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [r].[Name] = N'Customer' {"EventId":{"Id":20101,"Name":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command.CommandExecuted"},"SourceContext":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command","ActionId":"ab5535ba-6599-4173-9c57-11f34975db2b","ActionName":"AudioStore.Api.Controllers.AdminController.GetDashboardStats (AudioStore.Api)","RequestId":"0HNKTUO6D4268:0000017D","RequestPath":"/api/v1.0/admin/dashboard","ConnectionId":"0HNKTUO6D4268","MachineName":"MOHAMEDMOUSA","ThreadId":60,"EnvironmentName":"Development","Application":"AudioStore.API"}
2026-04-19 16:49:51.944 +02:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (1ms) [Parameters=[@p='5'], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT TOP(@p) [o].[ProductId], [p0].[Name] AS [ProductName], [p0].[MainImage] AS [ProductImage], [p0].[Brand], [c].[Name] AS [CategoryName], [p0].[StockQuantity], COALESCE(SUM([o].[Quantity]), 0) AS [TotalQuantitySold], COALESCE(SUM([o].[Subtotal]), 0.0) AS [TotalRevenue]
FROM [OrderItems] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[Status]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o0]
    WHERE [o0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [o1] ON [o].[OrderId] = [o1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[MainImage], [p].[Name], [p].[StockQuantity]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [p0] ON [o].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
INNER JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryID]
WHERE [o].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [o1].[Status] <> 4
GROUP BY [o].[ProductId], [p0].[Name], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[Brand], [c].[Name], [p0].[StockQuantity]

        FROM [Orders] AS [o0]
        WHERE [o0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [u].[Id] = [o0].[UserId]) AS [c]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    INNER JOIN [UserRoles] AS [u0] ON [u].[Id] = [u0].[UserId]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]

SELECT [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[SessionId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[Brand], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[CreatedById0], [s].[Description], [s].[GalleryImages], [s].[IsAvailable], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[IsFeatured], [s].[IsNewProduct], [s].[IsPublished], [s].[MainImage], [s].[ModifiedById0], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Slug], [s].[Specifications], [s].[StockQuantity], [s].[UpdatedAt0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedById], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[ModifiedById], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[RegistrationDate], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UserName]
FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[CartItemID], [c1].[CartId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[ProductId], [c1].[Quantity], [c1].[UnitPrice], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]
WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[CartID] = [c0].[CartId]) AND COALESCE([c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[CreatedAt]) < @updatedBefore AND ([c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] IS NULL OR [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] < @emailCooldownBefore)

SELECT [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[SessionId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[Brand], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[CreatedById0], [s].[Description], [s].[GalleryImages], [s].[IsAvailable], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[IsFeatured], [s].[IsNewProduct], [s].[IsPublished], [s].[MainImage], [s].[ModifiedById0], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Slug], [s].[Specifications], [s].[StockQuantity], [s].[UpdatedAt0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedById], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[ModifiedById], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[RegistrationDate], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UserName]
FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[CartItemID], [c1].[CartId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[ProductId], [c1].[Quantity], [c1].[UnitPrice], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]
WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[CartID] = [c0].[CartId]) AND COALESCE([c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[CreatedAt]) < @updatedBefore AND ([c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] IS NULL OR [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] < @emailCooldownBefore)

FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[CartItemID], [c1].[CartId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[ProductId], [c1].[Quantity], [c1].[UnitPrice], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]
WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]

    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]

        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]

) AS [s] ON [c].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]

SELECT [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[SessionId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[Brand], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[CreatedById0], [s].[Description], [s].[GalleryImages], [s].[IsAvailable], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[IsFeatured], [s].[IsNewProduct], [s].[IsPublished], [s].[MainImage], [s].[ModifiedById0], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Slug], [s].[Specifications], [s].[StockQuantity], [s].[UpdatedAt0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedById], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[ModifiedById], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[RegistrationDate], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UserName]
FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[CartItemID], [c1].[CartId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[ProductId], [c1].[Quantity], [c1].[UnitPrice], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]
WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[CartID] = [c0].[CartId]) AND COALESCE([c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[CreatedAt]) < @updatedBefore AND ([c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] IS NULL OR [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] < @emailCooldownBefore)

SELECT [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[SessionId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[Brand], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[CreatedById0], [s].[Description], [s].[GalleryImages], [s].[IsAvailable], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[IsFeatured], [s].[IsNewProduct], [s].[IsPublished], [s].[MainImage], [s].[ModifiedById0], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Slug], [s].[Specifications], [s].[StockQuantity], [s].[UpdatedAt0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedById], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[ModifiedById], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[RegistrationDate], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UserName]
FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[CartItemID], [c1].[CartId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[ProductId], [c1].[Quantity], [c1].[UnitPrice], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]
WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[CartID] = [c0].[CartId]) AND COALESCE([c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[CreatedAt]) < @updatedBefore AND ([c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] IS NULL OR [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] < @emailCooldownBefore)

FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[CartItemID], [c1].[CartId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[ProductId], [c1].[Quantity], [c1].[UnitPrice], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]
WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]

SELECT [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[SessionId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedById], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ModifiedById], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[Brand], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[CreatedById0], [s].[Description], [s].[GalleryImages], [s].[IsAvailable], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[IsFeatured], [s].[IsNewProduct], [s].[IsPublished], [s].[MainImage], [s].[ModifiedById0], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Slug], [s].[Specifications], [s].[StockQuantity], [s].[UpdatedAt0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedById], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[ModifiedById], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[RegistrationDate], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UserName]
FROM [Carts] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [c].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[CartItemID], [c1].[CartId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedById], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[ModifiedById], [c1].[ProductId], [c1].[Quantity], [c1].[UnitPrice], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p0].[Brand], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedById] AS [CreatedById0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[GalleryImages], [p0].[IsAvailable], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[IsFeatured], [p0].[IsNewProduct], [p0].[IsPublished], [p0].[MainImage], [p0].[ModifiedById] AS [ModifiedById0], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[Slug], [p0].[Specifications], [p0].[StockQuantity], [p0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[Brand], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[Description], [p].[GalleryImages], [p].[IsAvailable], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewProduct], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[MainImage], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Slug], [p].[Specifications], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [Products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [p0] ON [c1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductID]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s] ON [c].[CartID] = [s].[CartId]
WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [c].[UserId] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [c].[CartID] = [c0].[CartId]) AND COALESCE([c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[CreatedAt]) < @updatedBefore AND ([c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] IS NULL OR [c].[LastAbandonedCartEmailSentAt] < @emailCooldownBefore)
ORDER BY [c].[CartID], [u].[Id], [s].[CartItemID] {"EventId":{"Id":20101,"Name":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command.CommandExecuted"},"SourceContext":"Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command","MachineName":"MOHAMEDMOUSA","ThreadId":99,"EnvironmentName":"Development","Application":"AudioStore.API"}
